result.reason: During auto-reconnect, RDP client properties (including window size) are not re-applied because the method responsible for setting these properties is commented out in the reconnection logic.
result.approach: Uncomment and call `SetRdpClientProperties()` within the `tmrReconnect_Tick` method in `mRemoteNG\Connection\Protocol\RDP\RdpProtocol.cs` before `_rdpClient.Connect()`.
